iShares Core S&P 500 Index ETF (XUS)

Find here information about the iShares Core S&P 500 Idx ETF (XUS). Assess the XUS stock price quote today as well as the premarket and after hours trading prices.

What Is the iShares Core S&P 500 Idx Ticker Symbol?
XUS is the ticker symbol of the iShares Core S&P 500 Idx ETF.

What Is the XUS Stock Price Today?
The XUS stock price today is 60.47.

What Stock Exchange Is XUS Traded On?
XUS is listed and trades on the Toronto stock exchange.

Is XUS a Good ETF to Buy?
To assess the potential returns, find the XUS dividend yield and dividend history detailed below. Determining whether XUS—or any ETF—is a good buy requires comprehensive analysis. To evaluate its potential, users can sign up to InvestingPro, where they can assess stock price fair value and other essential metrics.

What are ETFs?
Looking to enhance your knowledge on ETFs? Within our ETF guide we answer questions such as what is an ETF and 'how do ETFs work'.

iShares Core S&P 500 ETF

-99.94%--12,319,040

iShares Core S&P 500 Index ETF Company Profile

iShares Core S&P 500 Index ETF is an exchange traded fund launched and managed by BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited. It is co-managed by BlackRock Institutional Trust Company, N.A. The fund invests in public equity markets of the United States. It invests directly and through other funds in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund invests in growth and value stocks of large-cap companies. It seeks to track the performance of the S&P 500 Index, by using full replication technique. iShares Core S&P 500 Index ETF was formed on April 10, 2013 and is domiciled in Canada.

The XUS stock price today is 60.47.

What is XUS?

XUS is an ETF issued by BlackRock Asset Management Canada Ltd and is listed and traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange.

From a Technical Analysis Perspective, Is XUS a Buy or Sell?

Based on moving averages and other technical indicators, the daily buy/sell signal is Strong Buy.

What is the XUS market cap?

When is the XUS dividend date?

The next dividend date for XUS is Dec 30, 2025.
